name: upi-flowpilot
author: Prashant Jagtap <jprbom@gmail.com>
description: Real-time UPI checkout reliability, flow selection, retry, and degradation intelligence for Bharat merchants.

scripts.build: npm --workspace backend run build && npm --workspace frontend run build
scripts.test: npm --workspace backend run test && npm --workspace frontend run test
scripts.verify: npm run build && npm run test && npm run audit:high
